family-pizza-argiro.name: Family Pizza

ingredients.item: 250 gratalagani of mesenia or Chios mast or other mastic grated cheese
1 kg of husked long-skinned or fresh commercial tomatoes
250 gratalagani of mesenia or Chios mast or other mastic grated cheese
1 kg of husked long-skinned or fresh commercial tomatoes

instructions: In a baking pan oiled or sprayed with flour, put the two dough sets together for pizza.
With a fork, we press them to unite and form a large sheet of pizza.
Click with your fingers to spread and grow the surface of the dough further.
Form in pizza, the periodter laced filling with sausage
Take the other two dough leaves, cut them into wide stripes and wrap the sauces.
With a sharp knife, cut them into thin slices, not down, and stick them around the pizza, joining the pizza dough with the dough of the wrapped sausage.
So, Sausage rings are forged around the pizza.

Brush the duck with touch tomato sauce. Spread the ham and cheeses over one layer. Beat with the herbs, rub pepper and baking in a well preheated oven, at 220.3.3. on the resistors, on the bottom grill, for about 25 minutes, until the pizza is well browned.
Brush the duck with touch tomato sauce.
Spread the ham and cheeses over one layer.
Beat with the herbs, rub pepper and baking in a well preheated oven, at 220.3.3. on the resistors, on the bottom grill, for about 25 minutes, until the pizza is well browned.

farmers-market-farro-bowls.name: Farmers Market Farro Bowls

ingredients.prep: trimmed, thinly sliced on a mandoline if you’ve got one

ingredients.item: . plus  0.25 cup grapeseed or vegetable oil

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, cut crosswise into  0.25"-thick half-moons

ingredients.item: Thinly sliced or shredded raw vegetables (such as carrots
ingredients.prep: scallions, blanched sugar snap peas, baby bok choy, cucumbers, pea shoots, or alfalfa sprouts)

instructions: Pour farro into a medium saucepan of boiling salted water, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until tender, 25–30 minutes. Drain farro and spread out on a rimmed baking sheet; let cool.

Meanwhile, using a slotted spoon, carefully lower eggs into a small saucepan of boiling water and cook 6½ minutes for an oozy, jammy yolk or 7 minutes for a slightly firmer middle. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water with slotted spoon and let sit until cool enough to handle, about 2 minutes. Remove eggs from ice water; peel and slice in half lengthwise.

Pack radish slices into a pint jar. Whisk vinegar, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ cup hot water in a small bowl until sugar and salt are dissolved. Pour brine over radish slices; let cool. Cover and chill at least 1 hour before using.

Cut tofu crosswise into ½"-thick slabs, then cut each slab on a diagonal to create 2 triangles. Pat dry with a clean kitchen towel. Heat 2 Tbsp. grapeseed oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add tofu in a single layer, season with salt, and cook, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, about
4 minutes. Turn over and cook until golden brown on second side, about 4 minutes. Transfer tofu to a plate; reserve skillet (no need to wipe out).

Whisk lime juice, gochujang, mayonnaise, ¼ cup grapeseed oil,
1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. sesame oil, and remaining 1 Tbsp. sugar in a small bowl. Taste; season with salt if desired.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. grapeseed oil in reserved skillet over medium-high. Add zucchini, season with salt, and cook, tossing just once or twice, until tender and blistered in spots, about 4 minutes. Add remaining 1 tsp. soy sauce and 1 tsp. sesame oil and toss to coat. Transfer to a plate.

To serve, divide farro among bowls. Arrange eggs, drained pickled radish, tofu, zucchini, and raw vegetables of choice on top as desired. Drizzle each bowl with a few spoonfuls of dressing to your liking.

fava-beans-stewed-with-fried-streaks-tel.name: Fava Beans Stewed With Fried Streaks
instructions: Season the intermeada with thick salt and let it rest in the cold overnight. In the day, wash the potatoes, cook them with the skin in salty water for 20 minutes, then drain them, let them cool down a bit and remove their skin. Also bake the beans in water for 15 minutes, then pour them out, lay them down for a pot, add the baked potatoes, chopped garlic and olive oil, take them to the fire and let them saute a little.

Take to the fire another pot with the lard, let it melt, add the intermeada cut into pieces and let it fry until golden. Then pour the intermeal, add it to the pot with the beans, season with a pinch of pepper, tape and let cook for 10 minutes, in mild heat and shaking the pot from time to time.
Wash the leaves of the leek, cut them into thin strips, add them to the pot, add also the chopped corianders, wrap, remove from the fire and serve hot.

Season the intermeada with thick salt and let it rest in the cold overnight. In the day, wash the potatoes, cook them with the skin in salty water for 20 minutes, then drain them, let them cool down a bit and remove their skin. Also bake the beans in water for 15 minutes, then pour them out, lay them down for a pot, add the baked potatoes, chopped garlic and olive oil, take them to the fire and let them saute a little.

Wash the leaves of the leek, cut them into thin strips, add them to the pot, add also the chopped corianders, wrap, remove from the fire and serve hot.

fennel-salad.name: Fennel Salad
instructions: To make the dressing: Whisk together sugar, vinegar, oil, basil, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until sugar dissolves.
To make the salad: Toss salad greens, orange sections, fennel, onion, almonds, and cranberries together in a large bowl.
Pour dressing over salad and toss to combine.

fennel-rubbed-pork-roast.name: Fennel-rubbed Pork Roast

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Rub pork with oil; season generously with salt and pepper and rub with fennel seeds, anise seeds, and red pepper flakes, pressing to adhere.
Place pork roast, fat side up, on a rimmed baking sheet and roast until deeply browned and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 135°, 60–70 minutes.
Transfer to a cutting board; let pork rest at least 10 minutes before slicing.

festive-pork-with-butter-sauce-argiro.name: Festive Pork With Butter Sauce

ingredients.item: 600 ml of meat or chicken warm
600 ml of meat or chicken warm

instructions: You can fill the roll with dried fruit or leave it plain.
Salt and pepper the inside, add the dried fruit and some pine cone.
Tie the pork neck or ask the butcher to pass it into a baking net, thus retaining the shape.
Add salt and pepper.
Heat a large pan that can be put in the ocean and sauté the pork for 7-8′ to brown around.
Add the garlic and thyme.
Add the wine and cover with non-stick paper and fol.
Transfer the vehicle to the oven.
Bake in a well rehearsed evening at 180°C in the air on the medium grill for 2 hours.
During baking wet the roll with its liquids so it doesn't dry.
After baking for 2 hours, mix the soft button with honey and some orange zest.
Uncover the roll and rub with the butter mixture.
Continue baking for 10-15′ until the surface caramelizes.
During baking, spread with the liquids of the baking pan.
Remove from oven and leave the meat covered after baking for 20′.
Cut slides and serve with the rich sauce.

fig-spice-cake.name: Fig Spice Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
Place dried figs into a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a simmer over low heat and cook until soft, about 5 minutes. Drain figs, reserving 1/2 cup cooking liquid.
Sift flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, and cloves into a bowl.
Cut figs into 1/4-inch cubes. Combine buttermilk and reserved cooking liquid in a medium bowl.

Beat sugar and butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs, one at a time, then stir in vanilla. Beat in flour mixture alternately with buttermilk mixture, then stir in figs and walnuts. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 50 to 60 minutes. Cool in pan for 15 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack and cool completely.

fish-ceviche-recipe-comedera.name: Fish Ceviche Recipe
instructions: Cut the purple onion into thin strips and sink it into water for 10 minutes, with this you will smooth the taste a little.
It pics the aji into thin strips, care that it has no seeds and no part of the vein, that's where the best hot taste is.
Clean the fish well and cut them into cubes about 1.5 cm in diameter.
He pics his little cilantro.
In the case of accompaniments, boil the batata without skin until it gets tender and ready.
Una vez hayas hecho todos estos primeros pasos, puedes proceder con el armado del ceviche como tal.
Meg the fish with onion, aji, cilantro and a pint of salt into a bowl where everything's comfortable.
Then add the lemon juice and stir well.
Do not wait more than 10 minutes to serve ceviche after adding lemon to fish. Just as I told you earlier, the idea isn't that it's been cooked too much.
Serve your ceviche in a plate with a tipple cut onto wheels on one side and maize on the other. You can also let everyone serve them at their best with or without an escort.
Company with banana / potato / maize chips if you feel like it.

fish-fillets-with-tomatoes-squash-and-ba.name: Fish Fillets With Tomatoes, Squash, And Basil

ingredients.item: Very thinly sliced assorted summer squash (such as zucchini

ingredients.prep: such as Atlantic cod or halibut

instructions: Place four 14x12" sheets of parchment paper, or heavy-duty foil if grilling, on a work surface. Divide squash among parchment sheets, arranging on one side of sheet in thin layers. Sprinkle shallots and sliced basil over, dividing equally. Scatter tomato halves around squash. Drizzle each packet with 1 Tbsp. wine and 1/2 Tbsp. oil (add 1/2 Tbsp. water to each if grilling). Season with salt and pepper. Place a fish fillet atop each portion. Season with salt and pepper; drizzle 1/2 Tbsp. oil over each.
Fold parchment over mixture and crimp edges tightly to form a sealed packet. DO AHEAD: Can be made 4 hours ahead. Chill. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before continuing.

Preheat oven to 400°. Place packets in a single layer on a large rimmed baking sheet. Alternatively, build a medium fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to medium-high. Bake or grill fish until just cooked through (a toothpick poked through the parchment will slide through fish easily), about 10 minutes. Carefully cut open packets (steam will escape). Garnish with basil leaves.

flourless-chocolate-meringue-cake.name: Flourless Chocolate Meringue Cake

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Brush pan with vegetable oil, making sure to coat sides all the way to the rim. Line bottom of pan with a parchment paper round; brush parchment with oil.

Heat 10 oz. (283 g) semisweet chocolate (64%–70% cacao), coarsely chopped, 6 Tbsp. grapeseed, avocado, or other neutral oil, ¼ cup strong brewed coffee, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large heatproof bowl set over a medium saucepan of gently simmering water (bowl should not touch water), stirring occasionally with a heatproof rubber spatula, until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth, about 5 minutes. Remove bowl from heat; add 5 large egg yolks, room temperature, 2 tsp. vanilla extract, and ¼ cup (50 g) granulated sugar and vigorously whisk to combine. Add ¾ cup (72 g) almond flour or almond meal and mix well. (Don’t worry if it looks broken and separated.) Add ¼ cup water and whisk vigorously until mixture comes back together and looks smooth and glossy. Set chocolate mixture aside.

Using an electric mixer on medium-low speed, beat 5 large egg whites, room temperature, and a pinch of salt in a large non-plastic bowl until frothy, about 20 seconds. Increase speed to medium-high and continue to beat until foamy and opaque, about 30 seconds. Beating constantly, gradually add remaining ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar in a slow, steady stream. Increase speed to high and beat until stiff peaks form and meringue is dense and glossy. (Be careful not to overbeat or it will be dry and grainy and difficult to incorporate into the batter.)

Scoop out a heaping cupful of meringue and set aside. Scrape about half of the remaining meringue into bowl with reserved chocolate mixture and fold gently with spatula until just a few streaks remain. Scrape in the rest of the meringue; fold just until evenly mixed and batter is light and airy. Scrape batter into prepared pan; smooth surface. Spoon dollops of reserved meringue over batter. Using a skewer or toothpick, swirl into batter—a little or a lot; it’s up to you.

Bake cake until surface is risen and cracked, meringue is light golden, and a tester inserted into the center comes out shiny but clean, 60–70 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and run a small knife or offset spatula between very top of cake and pan to loosen anywhere it may be stuck (this will help the cake settle evenly as it cools). Let cake cool in pan.
To serve, run knife around sides again to loosen cake, then unmold.

fried-bread-with-feta-argiro.name: Fried Bread With Feta
instructions: For traditional fried bread,
Add the flower, yeast and a spoon to a bowl.
Dissolve the salt in the water and pour it into the flower.
Mix the injectors in instrumental dough with a spoon.
Remove the liquid dough on the counter and ferment for a few minutes to become smooth again if necessary, add some flour.
Place the dough in an oily bowl, cover it and place it at room temperature for about 1 hour, until it swells.
Cut our dough into six or eight pieces, depending on how big we want to make the fried breads.
On a flowered surface and when necessary sprinkle flour, spread the dough into a something sheet.
Add feta scrubs, close the edges of the dough in the center and press on to open in a thin Leaf.
We like to prepare the rest of thefried bread.
If you want plain fried bread with cinnamon sugar, you will do the same recipe, just skip the slide.
Add some oil to the pan and just fry the fried bread on both sides for 2 to 3 minutes, until golden.
Remove thefried bread on abstract paper to draw the excess oil.

fried-flounder-recipe-lezzet.name: Fried Flounder Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 water glass liquid oil for frying (flower or corn oil can be preferred)
Lemon slices for service and parsley

instructions: 1. Wash and dry with paper towel.
2.   Mix flour, salt, pepper and optional pepper in a bowl.
3. More you can add an end to corn flour.
4. Find all two sides of the fillets in the mixture.
5.  Fazla unu silkeleyin.
6. Medium-y&uuml of liquid oil in a large pan;heat in fire.
7. Take the fish in the pan and fry both sides up to 3–4 minutes to gold color.
8. Fish paper base.
9. Serve with lemon slices and chopped parsley.

fried-scorpionfish-recipe-comedera.name: Fried Scorpionfish Recipe
instructions: Hazle al cabracho dos aberturas en la parte del filete para que se cocine bien.
Warm a frying pan with high heat and when at temperature, add the oil to warm as well.
Peel both garlic and chisel teeth and put them with salt.
Sazona el pescado con la mezcla de sal y ajo por dentro y por fuera.
When the oil's hot, it incorporates the fish and fres for about 6 minutes from each side or when it's roasted.
Once ready, remove from frying pan and place onto absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Be with your favorite garrison and enjoy.

fruit-cream-teleculinaria.name: Fruit Cream

ingredients.item: Fresh fruit and mint to decorate
Fresh fruit and mint to decorate

instructions: In a pot, mix the yolks with sugar, the moreena flour and milk. Bring it to the fire, stirring always to get a thick, homogeneous cream. Take it out of the fire and let it cool.

Then divide the cream into three equal parts. Fix the fruit, cut into pieces and crush each of them together with a portion of the cream. Distribute to glasses or glasses without filling them too much, and lead to cold before serving.
When serving, tap the creams in whipped cream and dispose in the bowls on the fruit creams. Decorate with pieces of fresh fruit and mint and serve.

Then divide the cream into three equal parts. Fix the fruit, cut into pieces and crush each of them together with a portion of the cream. Distribute to glasses or glasses without filling them too much, and lead to cold before serving.

fruitcake.name: Fruitcake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 135°C (135 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9-inch tube pan.
Whisk flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, and cloves together in a large bowl.
Beat sugar, eggs, lemon zest, vanilla, brandy, and melted butter together in a separate bowl until well blended.
Stir butter mixture into flour mixture until combined, then fold in dried fruit, raisins, and nuts.
Transfer cake batter into prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour 45 minutes to 2 hours.
Cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.

fully-salted-roast-chicken.name: Fully Salted Roast Chicken
instructions: Pat dry chicken with paper towels. Holding a 5-finger pinch of salt and positioning your hand at least 10" above chicken, evenly rain salt down over chicken. Repeat with several more pinches of salt until both inside and outside of chicken are covered with salt (be generous and make sure to get inside all the nooks and crannies). Place chicken on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet and chill uncovered at least 8 hours and up to 1 day.
Let sit at room temperature 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 425°.
Roast chicken until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of chicken thigh registers 165°, 40–55 minutes.
Transfer chicken to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes before carving.
